name: ESCAPE Room: Reality
short_description: You wake up in a locked classroom with a few strangers and no memories of how you got there... With only your puzzle-solving skills to rely on, can you uncover the secrets and mysteries behind your captivity and escape? Put your skills to the test and escape if you can!!
detailed_description:
Are You Ready to Put Your Puzzle-Solving Skills to the Test?


In ESCAPE: Room Reality, you'll be challenged to explore a series of locked rooms and gather clues in order to escape. With no memories of how you got there, you'll have to work with the other strangers trapped with you – but not everyone around you is an ally.

Explore, Deduce, Escape


As you explore the rooms and gather clues, you'll need to use your wits to deduce the truth and solve the puzzles that stand between you and freedom. Keep an eye out for hidden puzzles, too – they could hold the key to unlocking deeper secrets. With multiple endings and paths to choose from, ESCAPE: Room Reality offers multiple playthroughs with a mix of shared and unique puzzles.

Get Ready to Escape


Are you ready to put your puzzle-solving skills to the test? Get set to escape – the clock is ticking!

Hint: While it's not necessary, having pen & paper around can be helpful.
